text.title: Runtime Hallucination Detection Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Runtime Hallucination Detection output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: the user-facing abstention message + escalation route

forbidden.pattern: self_consistency not applied to critical fields

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: claim_decomposition populated with a typed value
attribution_check populated with a typed value
self_consistency populated with a typed value
abstention_policy populated with a typed value
drift_metrics populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
